title: Rustins Quick Dry Outdoor Wood Stain Ebony 1ltr - Durable and Weather-Resistant Finish, Fast Drying, Vibrant Color for Decks, Fences, & Furniture, Available in Many Wood Shades
features: Gives long lasting protection to all external wood
Fast Drying Formula: This wood stain dries quickly, allowing you to complete your outdoor projects efficiently and with minimal waiting time between coats, perfect for quick turnarounds

Wide Range of Wood Shades: Available in many wood shades, Rustins Quick Dry Outdoor Wood Stain offers a variety of options to match and enhance the natural beauty of your outdoor wood surfaces ADD TO BASKET now
Easy Application: The smooth consistency of this stain makes it easy to apply with a brush, roller, or spray, ensuring even coverage and a professional finish on all types of outdoor wood surfaces
Versatile Sizes: Available in 1L and 5L sizes, Rustins Quick Dry Outdoor Wood Stain caters to both small and large projects, providing the right amount of product to suit your needs

specifications_table.Coverage: ‎Good coverage, covers up to 200 sq. ft. per litre (estimated)
